params.name: The Grand Odalisque
params.description: The Grand Odalisque depicts a nude Turkish concubine with an oriental flair, lying on her side on a soft bed, looking back at the viewer with a serene and expressionless face, possessing the beauty of an ancient Greek sculpture. The most praised aspect is her slightly exaggerated elongated back, intricately detailed and stunningly beautiful. InThis painting, Ingres did not strictly adhere to human proportions in depicting the female body but instead applied distortion and exaggeration to highlig …
